name: Hickory-Flavored Mini-Dogs
recipeIngredient: 60 cocktail hot dogs, OR regular hot dogs -- cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan combine all ingredients except the hot dogs.
2. Simmer the mixture for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. If the mixture becomes thicker than desired, thin out with a small amount of water, adding a tablespoon at a time.
4. Add the mini-dogs to the sauce and simmer until they are warmed through.
5. Transfer the sauce and mini-dogs to a chafing dish and serve hot. Makes about 60.
Do-Ahead Note: Prepare the sauce several days in advance and refrigerate. At party time, add the mini-dogs to the sauce, heat thoroughly, and serve.
